name: ProjectsFoldersApi
summary: Bluebeam Studio API — Projects / Folders endpoints. Auto-generated REST surface; one method per HTTP operation.

methods.name: ListFolderItems
methods.summary: Get files and/or folders contained within specified folder. Use 0 to get the project's root folder items
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders/{id}/items`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: GetFolder
methods.summary: Get project folder metadata. Use 0 to get the project's root folder
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: UpdateFolder
methods.signature: Task UpdateFolder(Guid projectId, Guid id, UpdateFolderRequest request)
methods.summary: Update project folder. To move the folder, change its parent folder id
methods.remarks: HTTP PUT `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Name, ParentFolderId.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: DeleteFolder
methods.remarks: HTTP DELETE `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders/{id}`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: CreateProjectFolder
methods.summary: Create a new empty project folder
methods.remarks: HTTP POST `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

params.name: request
params.doc: Request body. JSON object with fields: Comment, Name, ParentFolderId.

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.

methods.name: ListProjectFolders
methods.summary: Get all files in a project
methods.remarks: HTTP GET `/publicapi/v1/projects/{projectId}/folders`. Vendor docs page: https://support.bluebeam.com/developer/

throws.when: Thrown when the HTTP call returns a non-2xx status.
